---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability for FlutterForge AI
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

### Problem
What are you trying to accomplish that the package doesn't support yet?

### Proposal
How could FlutterForge AI solve it? (APIs, UI, config knobs.)

### Alternatives
What did you consider and reject, and why?

### Additional context
Links, screenshots, examples from other packages.
